headline: Devon And Coterra Merger Aims For Scale Synergies And Steadier Cash Flow
summary: Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) has agreed to a transformative all stock merger with Coterra Energy, creating a larger independent shale operator. The combined company targets $1b in annual synergies and plans an updated shareholder return policy anchored by more resilient cash flow. Long term contracts are expected to support cash generation and help smooth the impact of commodity price swings. Devon Energy comes into this merger with the stock at $48.66 and a return of 28.5% year to date. Shares...
